source_jobs.title: Product Analyst
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.




WHO YOU’LL BE WORKING WITH:

We want you to better understand how our company is structured from the inside and who you’ll be working with every day — that’s why we’re sharing a brief overview of our team ☺️

Our team https://silent-alphabet-af2.notion.site/21bdd9d87435814395bdeb8a0da71602?source=copy_link&v=21bdd9d87435816a8a6e000c80c1bde0




WHY IS THIS INTERESTING?

 - Join a fast-growing, #1 product in its niche

 - Influence strategic product decisions — we actively listen to our team, so your input will directly impact functionality, user experience, and the product’s future

 - High level of autonomy - we put a lot of trust in our team




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Analyze new feature rollouts to determine their true value to the user and impact on the product

 - Dig deep into data to uncover product growth points, focusing on user retention, activity, and drop‑offs

 - Define, build, and track core metrics—retention, activation, engagement, and conversion—to keep a pulse on product health

 - Conduct deep analysis of A/B tests, guiding the process from generating hypotheses to formulating actionable insights




YOUR SKILLS:

 - 2+ years of experience in product analytics

 - Strong proficiency in writing SQL queries (experience with BigQuery is a major plus)

 - Hands-on experience with visualization tools (Tableau or similar). You know how to build dashboards that turn raw data into a clear story

 - You don’t stop at building reports; you strive to understand the "why" behind the data and use it to influence product decisions

 - You can translate complex data into plain language that clearly answers the question: “What’s next?
   
   


WILL BE A PLUS:

Practical knowledge of A/B testing. You can independently run tests, understand statistical significance, and interpret results (chi-square, z-test, and Mann–Whitney don't scare you!)




HOW WE GET THINGS DONE?

We are remote-first, but ideally, you should be in the CET or EET time zone




HOW DO WE UNWIND?

We offer our team 20 working days of paid vacation. We’re also very flexible with days off :)




WHAT DO WE OFFER?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are a key part of our success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players




CANDIDATE JOURNEY:

 - Screening interview

 - Technical Interview with the team

 - Final Interview with the Co-founders

 - Offer 🎉




OUR VALUES:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what it is

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.


WHY IS THIS INTERESTING?

 - Join a fast-growing, #1 product in its niche

 - Influence strategic product decisions — we actively listen to our team, so your input will directly impact functionality, user experience, and the product’s future

 - High level of autonomy — we put a lot of trust in our team


YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

You will play a key role in building and developing the Mindly product. This is more than just writing code — it’s about deep user understanding, product thinking, and effective collaboration with a cross-functional team.

You’ll work closely with Product Team and СEO in order to:

 - deeply understand user needs and their most pressing problems

 - shape and evaluate potential solutions to these problems

 - contribute to the development of AI-powered experiences, including workflows and the AI Companion that helps users who are interested in mental health support but are not yet ready to start therapy

 - use AI-native development practices to accelerate delivery, experimentation, and product discovery

You will become a true “Product Engineer”, someone who fully understands code, design, the user, and the business. Working independently, you’ll drive the entire development cycle: from identifying the problem to launching the finished solution into production.


YOUR SKILLS:

 - 3+ years of experience working with React.js and Node.js (we’re using TypeScript, React.js, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, Express.js, Nest.js)

 - Product thinking focused on solving user problems, not just on technical solutions

 - Experience building AI-powered products, LLM workflows, RAG systems, AI agents, or other AI-native applications or extensive experience using AI-assisted development tools as part of your daily engineering workflow

 - Strong engineering fundamentals and the ability to design scalable, maintainable systems

 - Ability to quickly learn new technologies, frameworks, and AI tools

 - Experience in mobile app development will be a huge plus


HOW WE GET THINGS DONE?

We are remote-first, and you can work from anywhere (CET or EET time zone)


HOW DO WE UNWIND?

We offer our team 20 days of paid vacation (we’re flexible with days off :))


WHAT DO WE OFFER?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are a key part of our success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players


CANDIDATE JOURNEY:

 - Screening interview / Intro chat

 - Technical interview with Senior Engineer

 - Final interview with co-founders

 - Offer 🎉


OUR VALUES:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what it is

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

source_jobs.title: AI Creative Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.

Mindly is a fast-growing international product company building a marketplace for psychologists and their clients.

Together with our CMO Masha, we’re looking for a AI Creative Designer to join our growth team and help scale one of the leading products in its niche.

We’re building a team where everyone has ownership, contributes to key decisions, and directly impacts the product’s growth. There are no “just executors” here — we work collaboratively to launch, test, and scale ideas.




Why is this interesting?

 - Join a fast-growing, #1 product in its niche

 - Direct impact on growth and creative strategy — your ideas won’t sit on the shelf

 - High level of autonomy and ownership

 - Work in a strong team of A-players who move fast and think big



Your responsibilities:

You will play a key role in shaping how Mindly communicates with users through creative.

This is more than just design execution — it’s about understanding users, testing ideas, and continuously improving performance.

Together with the team, you will:

 - Create high-performing ad creatives for Meta, Google, and TikTok

 - Generate and test hypotheses to improve creative performance

 - Research competitors and market trends, turning insights into actionable ideas

 - Experiment with new formats, concepts, and design approaches



Your skills:

 - 2+ years of experience as a Marketing Designer / Creative Designer

 - Experience creating digital advertising creatives

 - Strong skills in graphic and motion design tools

 - Confident use of AI tools and awareness of industry trends

 - Portfolio with real projects and ideas



How we work:

We are remote-first, but ideally, you are in the CET or EET time zone.



How do we unwind?

We offer 20 days of paid vacation and are flexible with days off.

You’ll also have a therapy budget you can use with any psychologist — for you and your partner.

What do we offer?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are part of the success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players

Candidate journey:

 - Screening interview / Intro chat

 - Interview with CMO

 - Work Sample

 - Final interview with co-founders

 - Offer 🎉
   
   

Our values:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

source_jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.

We are looking for Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our team to build one of the all-time great companies in mental health industry.




WHY IS THIS INTERESTING?

 - The #1 product in our niche, growing fast with real momentum

 - A seat at the table — you'll work directly with founders as a true business partner

 - High autonomy and trust — we hire adults and treat them that way
   
   


ABOUT YOU:

 - 2+ years in Talent Acquisition, ideally in a product or startup environment

 - Proven track record hiring across both technical and non-technical roles

 - Hands-on experience with ATS platforms (we use Ashby)

 - Comfortable working with recruiting analytics: funnel metrics, Time-to-Hire, pass-through rates, and using data to drive decisions and flag risks early

 - Ambitious and relentless — your effort and tenacity are on par with your drive

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and energized by building processes from scratch




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - End-to-end hiring. You run the full recruiting loop — from sourcing to offer — using AI and modern tooling to move fast, while applying sharp judgment where it matters

 - Proactive sourcing. You don't wait for inbound. You combine outreach, data, and new technologies to find and engage the strongest candidates before competitors do

 - Hiring manager partnership. You work closely with hiring managers to deeply understand team needs, set expectations, and keep pipelines moving

 - Recruiting analytics. You track what matters, spot risks early, and use data to forecast hiring timelines and improve decision-making




HOW WE GET THINGS DONE?

Remote-first, ideally, you should be in the CET or EET time zone.




HOW DO WE UNWIND?

We offer our team 20 days of paid vacation (we’re flexible with days off :))




WHAT DO WE OFFER?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are a key part of our success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players




CANDIDATE JOURNEY:

 - Screening interview

 - Team interview

 - Case study

 - Final Interview with co-founders

 - Offer 🎉




OUR VALUES:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what it is

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

source_jobs.title: Social Media Content Creator
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.

We’re looking for a Social Media Content Creator who understands internet culture, AI trends, storytelling, and how to create content people actually want to watch and share.




WHY IS THIS INTERESTING?

 - Join a fast-growing, #1 product in its niche

 - High level of ownership and creative freedom

 - Fast experimentation environment — ideas move quickly from concept to launch

 - High level of autonomy - we put a lot of trust in our team


YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

You will play a key role in shaping how Mindly acquire users through creative across all of the social media channels. This is more than just design execution — it’s about understanding users, creative storytelling, compelling viral AI content, and close collaboration with the Product Team.

 - Create short-form and long-form educational and entertainment AI-generated content for Instagram, TikTok, Youtube and other social media platforms on the topic of mental health and wellbeing

 - Generate content hypotheses and rapidly test ideas

 - Analyze content performance and iterate based on learnings

 - Research competitors, creators, trends, and platform behavior

 - Collaborate closely with the product team

 - Experiment constantly with hooks, storytelling formats, editing styles, and creative concepts

 - Stay up to date with the latest AI image and video generation tools, and use them in your daily work


YOUR SKILLS

 - Experience creating AI-generated content for TikTok, Instagram and YouTube

 - Creative Storytelling

 - Strong understanding of viral mechanics and internet culture

 - Ability to identify trends early and adapt them creatively

 - Confident use of AI tools for content creation (image and video)

 - Confident use of photo and video editing tools




HOW WE GET THINGS DONE?

Remote-first, but we have offices in Ukraine (Kyiv, Lviv, Vinnytsia) and in Poland (Warsaw), so you can mix and match if you prefer. Ideally, you should be in the CET or EET time zone.




HOW DO WE UNWIND?

We offer our team 20 working days of paid vacation. We’re also very flexible with days off :)




WHAT DO WE OFFER?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are a key part of our success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players


CANDIDATE JOURNEY:

 - Screening with Recruiter

 - Interview with CMO

 - Work Sample

 - Final Interview with co-founders

 - Offer 🎉


OUR VALUES:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what it is

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Agent
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MINDLY


Mindly is an international product company — a marketplace for psychologists and their clients. We have over 1,000,000 clients in more than 40 countries worldwide, with a primary focus on Tier-1 markets. Mindly is one of the fastest-growing companies in the HealthTech sector globally. Our goal is to help people live healthy, happy, and fulfilling lives. We are growing extremely fast and are already profitable! This puts our company in the top 1% of the fastest-growing profitable tech companies in the world! You can read more about us in this article https://en.ain.ua/2024/01/16/mindly-raises-a-2m-seed-round-while-growing-rapidly/.


WHY IS THIS INTERESTING?

 - Join a fast-growing, #1 product in its niche

 - High level of autonomy — we put a lot of trust in our team

 - We don't have "just executors" — our entire growth team collaborates to launch, test, and scale ideas that make an impact.

 


YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Provide timely, empathetic, and personalized support to platform users (primarily customers);

 - Handle requests related to accounts, subscriptions, refunds, and various technical issues concerning the platform;

 - Ensure a positive user experience while resolving customer inquiries;

 - Turn user feedback into valuable insights for other teams, helping shape and improve the product.

 


YOUR SKILLS:

 - Experience working as a Customer Support, Customer Success, or in a related role;

 - Native-level Ukrainian and English proficiency at C1+ level;

 - Empathy and the ability to build trusting relationships with users;

 - Initiative in solving not only existing customer issues but also preventing potential ones;

 - Curiosity and enthusiasm for solving non-standard challenges.

 


HOW WE GET THINGS DONE?

Remote-first, but ideally, you should be in the CET or EET time zone

 


HOW DO WE UNWIND?

We offer our team 20 days of paid vacation (we’re flexible with days off :))




WHAT DO WE OFFER?

 - A fast-growing product company where you are a key part of our success

 - Competitive salary

 - Therapy on Mindly

 - A strong team of A-players

 


CANDIDATE JOURNEY:

 - Screening interview with Recruiter

 - Test task

 - Interview with Customer Support Lead

 - Final Interview with co-founders

 - Offer 🎉
   
    


OUR VALUES:

 - Honesty and transparency: always tell the truth, no matter what it is

 - Empathy and understanding: treat others the way you want to be treated

notes: HealthTech company with a strong product focus and a growing customer base.
